parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ phone_number: $json.phone, channel: 'whatsapp', message_type: 'template', template: { name: $json.csConfig.templateName, language: { code: 'id' }, components: [{ type: 'body', parameters: [ { type: 'text', text: $json.total }, { type: 'text', text: $json.customerName }, { type: 'text', text: $json.csConfig.senderName }, { type: 'text', text: $json.products }, { type: 'text', text: $json.productsSubtotal }, { type: 'text', text: $json.shippingCost }, { type: 'text', text: $json.phone }, { type: 'text', text: $json.shippingAddress }, { type: 'text', text: $json.shippingDistrict }, { type: 'text', text: $json.shippingCity } ] }] } }) }}
